expectations.evidence: Skill References Used: 'workflows/sync-bmad-documents.md -- full sync workflow (Steps 1-9)' and 'references/sync-mapping-guide.md'

expectations.text: Uses sync.mjs status to detect document type as 'prd' and target as 'confluence'
expectations.evidence: Step 2: 'node <skill-path>/scripts/sync.mjs status docs/prd/platform-prd.md' and Step 1 confirms 'PRD documents target Confluence (not Jira)'

expectations.text: Asks the user which Confluence space to publish to
expectations.evidence: Step 3: 'ask the user: 1. Which Confluence space key? (e.g., TEAM, ENG, PROD)'
Step 3 Option A: 'node <skill-path>/scripts/sync.mjs link docs/prd/platform-prd.md --type prd --space <SPACE_KEY> --create'

expectations.text: Confirms confluence_page_id was added to the document frontmatter
expectations.evidence: Step 3: 'Add confluence_page_id to the document's YAML frontmatter (or prefix the title with [PageID] if no frontmatter)'

expectations.text: Content is converted from markdown to Confluence storage format (markdownToStorage)
expectations.evidence: Step 8: 'Convert each markdown section to Confluence storage format' and Key Decision 5: 'markdownToStorage transform -- Confluence uses HTML-based storage format, not markdown'
